channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Prices are up, but Mother's Day still means brunch
item.description: It's the biggest day for America's restaurants, and one of the biggest for flower sales. Despite anxieties over rising gas prices, people are ready to splurge to celebrate.
item.content:encoded:
It's the biggest day for America's restaurants, and one of the biggest for flower sales. Despite anxieties over rising gas prices, people are ready to splurge to celebrate.

(Image credit: Brandon Bell)
item.dc:creator: Alina Selyukh

item.title: Spain readies for evacuations as a hantavirus-hit cruise ship heads for Canary Islands
item.description: Spanish authorities are preparing to receive more than 140 passengers and crew members on board a hantavirus-stricken cruise ship headed for the Canary Islands.
item.content:encoded:
Spanish authorities are preparing to receive more than 140 passengers and crew members on board a hantavirus-stricken cruise ship headed for the Canary Islands.

(Image credit: Misper Apawu)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: What video got Kash Patel in the headlines this week? The quiz knows
item.description: Plus: The Met Gala, GameStop, Canada and Banksy (again!).
item.content:encoded: Plus: The Met Gala, GameStop, Canada and Banksy (again!).
item.dc:creator: Holly J. Morris

item.title: Trump's Truth Social lays bare narrow obsessions of an extremely online president
item.description: The bulk of the president's social media posts don't make news. But taken together they show what's on his mind as he leads the nation through war and domestic turmoil.
item.content:encoded:
The bulk of the president's social media posts don't make news. But taken together they show what's on his mind as he leads the nation through war and domestic turmoil.

(Image credit: Saul Loeb)
item.dc:creator: Danielle Kurtzleben

item.title: European countries emerge as NATO leaders as U.S. role recedes
item.description: President Trump's decision to leave NATO in the dark before launching strikes on Iran has inflamed tensions and is putting new urgency on rethinking the alliance.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump's decision to leave NATO in the dark before launching strikes on Iran has inflamed tensions and is putting new urgency on rethinking the alliance.

(Image credit: Chip Somodevilla)
item.dc:creator: Scott Neuman

item.title: With Spirit in liquidation, here's what happens next to its planes
item.description: When Spirit Airlines stopped flying last weekend, it left more than 90 planes scattered across the country. Many will go back to the companies that own them, while Spirit tries to monetize the rest.
item.content:encoded:
When Spirit Airlines stopped flying last weekend, it left more than 90 planes scattered across the country. Many will go back to the companies that own them, while Spirit tries to monetize the rest.

(Image credit: Giorgio Viera)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: David Attenborough celebrates his 100th birthday
item.description: He was born before the Great Depression, came of age in WWII, and is still making wildlife documentaries. Brits call David Attenborough a national hero, as he celebrates his 100th birthday.
item.content:encoded: He was born before the Great Depression, came of age in WWII, and is still making wildlife documentaries. Brits call David Attenborough a national hero, as he celebrates his 100th birthday.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Frayer

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: U.S. and Iran trade fire amid month-old ceasefire, Tennessee becomes first state to draw new U.S. House map after SCOTUS decision, U.S.'s continued strikes on alleged drug boats raise questions.
item.content:encoded: U.S. and Iran trade fire amid month-old ceasefire, Tennessee becomes first state to draw new U.S. House map after SCOTUS decision, U.S.'s continued strikes on alleged drug boats raise questions.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: March Madness tournaments will expand to 76 teams each starting next season
item.description: The NCAA will expand its March Madness tournaments by eight teams each next season. It will add more early-round games in the first week without altering the overall format.
item.content:encoded:
The NCAA will expand its March Madness tournaments by eight teams each next season. It will add more early-round games in the first week without altering the overall format.

(Image credit: Gene J. Puskar)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: North Korea says it will deploy new artillery guns targeting Seoul
item.description: North Korea says it'll deploy new long-range artillery systems capable of striking the capital region of rival South Korea this year and commission its first naval destroyer in coming weeks.
item.content:encoded:
North Korea says it'll deploy new long-range artillery systems capable of striking the capital region of rival South Korea this year and commission its first naval destroyer in coming weeks.

(Image credit: Korean Central News Agency/Korea News Service)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
